data.title: Century Communities Introduces Legacy at Kime Ranch, Offering New Homes with Elevated Design in Parker, CO
data.description: On March 28, a grand opening event will unveil spacious floor plans with high-end finishes at a convenient location near Mainstreet in PARKER, Colorado. The event is set to showcase the offerings of Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a prominent national homebuilder known for its expertise in online home sales. This company has a strong reputation and has been featured prominently in the industry.

data.title: ZINZINO AB (PUBL): Share subscription due to directed new share issues
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on March 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of a company recently announced two directed share issues as per the authorization received from the Annual General Meeting on May 28, 2025. A total of 401,965 new Zinzino B shares will be issued through set-off.

data.title: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) Expands B2B Distribution with LG Electronics, Adding ~60M Smart TVs
data.description: Earlier today, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a prominent creator-centered music, entertainment, and tech platform, revealed a new B2B collaboration with LG Electronics. This strategic partnership aims to introduce LiveOne's high-quality content network to a vast audience in North America. LG Electronics, a top manufacturer of smart TVs globally, will help expand the reach of LiveOne's offerings to millions of households in the region.

data.title: Nebius Operating Margin Turns Positive In FY27: Analyst
data.description: Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) recently completed its offering of convertible senior notes, generating around $3.96 billion in net proceeds post discounts and expenses. The funds are intended for constructing data centers, enhancing the AI cloud, expanding data center presence, acquiring crucial components like GPUs, and for general corporate use. Following this, Bank of America Securities analyst Tal Liani initiated coverage on NBIS with a Buy rating and a target price of $150. Liani predicts a substantial revenue surge for the company, estimating growth rates of 501% in 2026, 199% in 2027, and 64% in 2028, with positive operating margins projected by FY27. The AI infrastructure sector, identified as a swiftly expanding market, plays a key role in this development as stated in the full article available elsewhere.

data.title: Anyscale boosts AI inference with 88% lower latency, reaching 11.1x throughput gain for LLM workloads in enterprise setups.
data.description: Anyscale has revealed significant improvements in Ray Serve through the integration of HAProxy and gRPC, resulting in a remarkable 11.1 times increase in throughput for Large Language Model (LLM) inference tasks within enterprise setups. This enhancement is expected to greatly benefit organizations dealing with high-demand workloads, showcasing the potential for substantial efficiency boosts in this context.

data.title: Linda C. Mack and Mack International shortlisted in two categories for the 2026 Family Wealth Report Awards
data.description: During the 13th annual 2026 Family Wealth Report awards, Linda C. Mack and Mack International were named as finalists in two categories. They are up for Best Wealth Management Executive Search Firm and Top Women in Wealth Management. The winners will be revealed during the awards ceremony in New York City in April.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Mixed; LNG Name Rallies, Netgear Spikes (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rebound and traded higher. Netgear emerged as a significant player in the stock market with a notable increase. The stock market showed a mix in performance today, with the Dow and Nasdaq exhibiting varying trends. Amidst this, a particular LNG company saw a surge in its valuation, and Netgear witnessed a spike in its stock value, attracting attention from investors. This event was closely followed with live coverage, providing crucial updates on the market movements.

data.title: Wisq Ranked #2 on Fast Company's List of the Most Innovative Companies in Human Resources For 2026
data.description: A groundbreaking AI HR Generalist developed by Wisq is revolutionizing HR practices. Based in Redwood City, Calif., Wisq's Agentic HR Platform has been recognized by Fast Company as one of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026. This acknowledgement spotlights Wisq's pioneering approach in reshaping the HR landscape.
